policy.lowToMedium: Allowed only for beaches with medium geospatial exposure, valid facingDeg, all eight sector decisions, and no stronger authored profile.
policy.high: Never granted by this backfill. High still requires trusted local/nautical/watersports or repeated observed evidence.
policy.protectedClaims: Geospatial backfill is conservative and does not grant guaranteed calm/protected claims by itself.
